allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const c=fs.readFileSync\(''.env'',''utf8''\); console.log\(''Taille:'', c.length, ''bytes''\); console.log\(''Lignes:'', c.split\(''\\n''\).length\); console.log\(''Contient ANTHROPIC:'', c.includes\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''dotenv''\); console.log\(''Version dotenv:'', d.version || ''unknown''\); const r = d.config\({debug: true}\); console.log\(''Parsed:'', JSON.stringify\(r.parsed\)\); console.log\(''Error:'', r.error?.message\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/rpg/start -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""premise"":""RPG fantasy médiéval sombre""}")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./server/dateGuessData''\); console.log\(''Images:'', d.IMAGES.length\); console.log\(''Score exact:'', d.calculateScore\(1945,2,1945,2\)\); console.log\(''Score exact sans mois:'', d.calculateScore\(1945,null,1945,2\)\); console.log\(''Score 1 an:'', d.calculateScore\(1944,null,1945,2\)\); console.log\(''Score 10 ans:'', d.calculateScore\(1935,null,1945,2\)\); console.log\(''Score 100 ans:'', d.calculateScore\(1845,null,1945,2\)\); console.log\(''Score 101 ans:'', d.calculateScore\(1844,null,1945,2\)\);")
